summary: Visual Workflow Builder feature - All features tested and working. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI features verified working correctly including workflow creation, editor, node palette, node configuration, duplicate, and delete.

issues: Node configuration Sheet panel overlays the header when open, making Save button harder to click. User needs to close the panel first or use force click. This is a minor UX issue.

passed_tests: Admin can access Workflows page from sidebar
Admin can create a new workflow with name and description
Workflow editor loads with Node Palette and canvas
Workflow starts with a Trigger node by default
Node palette shows 5 node types: Trigger, Form, Action, Condition, End
Clicking a node opens configuration panel
Node configuration shows appropriate settings for each node type (Trigger Type selector, Node Label input, Delete Node button)
Save workflow button saves changes to backend
Workflows are listed on the main Workflows page
Can duplicate workflows via dropdown menu
Can delete workflows via dropdown menu (with confirmation dialog)
Backend: POST /api/workflows creates workflow
Backend: GET /api/workflows lists all workflows
Backend: GET /api/workflows/{id} gets specific workflow
Backend: PUT /api/workflows/{id} updates workflow with nodes/edges
Backend: PATCH /api/workflows/{id} partial update
Backend: POST /api/workflows/{id}/duplicate duplicates workflow
Backend: DELETE /api/workflows/{id} soft deletes workflow
Backend: GET /api/workflows/meta/actions returns available actions
Backend: GET /api/workflows/meta/field-types returns form field types
Backend: Workflow with all 5 node types (trigger, form, action, condition, end) creates successfully
critical_code_review_comments: React Flow library integration working correctly for visual workflow builder
All 5 node types implemented: Trigger (green), Form (blue), Action (amber), Condition (purple), End (red)
Node configuration panel shows appropriate settings per node type
Duplicate and delete workflows working via dropdown menu
SMTP email sending is MOCKED (as expected per requirements)
seed_data_creation: Test workflows created during testing: 'Test Workflow from UI', 'Duplicated Test Workflow'. These can be cleaned up if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Visual Workflow Builder feature fully functional. Backend APIs: POST/GET/PUT/PATCH/DELETE /api/workflows, duplicate endpoint, meta endpoints for actions and field types. Frontend: Workflows list page with search, create dialog, workflow editor with React Flow canvas, node palette (5 types), node configuration panel. Test credentials: admin@redribbonops.com / Fmtvvl171**. SMTP is MOCKED.

workflows_page.sidebar_link: Working - Workflows link visible for Admin
workflows_page.workflow_cards: Working - Shows workflow name, description, node count, connection count

workflow_editor.canvas: Working - React Flow canvas with grid background
workflow_editor.node_palette: Working - 5 node types: Trigger, Form, Action, Condition, End
workflow_editor.default_trigger: Working - New workflows start with Trigger node
workflow_editor.node_config_panel: Working - Shows Node Label, type-specific settings, Delete button
